view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email interaction is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for branching logic by confirming the presence of a condition step in the marketing campaign that checks if an email was opened. Specifically, the evidence shows a step with the key 'if_opened' that triggers different actions based on whether the email was opened or not, thus fulfilling the requirement. This is directly supported by the evidence from the prior step validation, which includes the condition expression for the email opened event.
